CompileInput.description: One closed compiler input. Blob references resolve only against bytes supplied with the same request/session. In every ResourceLimits field, omission or the canonical value 0 selects the Go facade default; a positive value overrides it.

CanonicalSourcePath.description: A canonical relative slash-separated source-tree path with no dot, dot-dot, empty, absolute, backslash, or NUL segment.

EngineProtocolRef.description: The fixed Engine 1.0 bootstrap reference used by handshake and by a no-overlap rejection response; successful 1.0 operations use the same exact reference.

ExportRecipeBlobRef.description: A request-lifetime canonical CompiledExportRecipeDocument. The media type is role-specific even when bytes happen to equal a subobject of another artifact.

NormalizedPackArtifactBlobRef.description: The public normalized Pack artifact bytes contain exactly the same JSON value as the canonical normalized Pack document; the canonical RFC 8785 UTF-8 bytes have no trailing LF, and these public bytes are exactly those canonical bytes followed by one LF.

NormalizedPackCanonicalBlobRef.description: The canonical normalized Pack document bytes: RFC 8785 UTF-8 with no trailing LF.

NormalizedProjectArtifactBlobRef.description: The public normalized Project artifact bytes contain exactly the same JSON value as the canonical normalized Project document; the canonical RFC 8785 UTF-8 bytes have no trailing LF, and these public bytes are exactly those canonical bytes followed by one LF.

NormalizedProjectCanonicalBlobRef.description: The canonical normalized Project document bytes: RFC 8785 UTF-8 with no trailing LF.

QueryRecipeBlobRef.description: A request-lifetime canonical CompiledQueryRecipeDocument. The media type is role-specific even when bytes happen to equal a subobject of another artifact.

ViewRecipeBlobRef.description: A request-lifetime canonical CompiledViewRecipeDocument. The media type is role-specific even when bytes happen to equal a subobject of another artifact.

CompiledExportRecipeArtifact.description: A compiled Export recipe bound to a CompiledExportRecipeDocument encoded as canonical JSON bytes supplied out of band.

CompiledQueryRecipeArtifact.description: A compiled Query recipe bound to a CompiledQueryRecipeDocument encoded as canonical JSON bytes supplied out of band.

CompiledViewRecipeArtifact.description: A compiled View recipe bound to a CompiledViewRecipeDocument encoded as canonical JSON bytes supplied out of band.

CompiledRecipes.description: The complete ordered compiled Query, View, and Export recipe sets.

NormalizedArtifact.description: A validated tagged union retaining the normalized Project or Pack artifact without exposing compiler-domain structs.

NormalizedPackArtifact.description: The complete normalized Pack artifact as canonical and public artifact JSON blob bindings.

NormalizedProjectArtifact.description: The complete normalized Project artifact as canonical and public artifact JSON blob bindings.

DocumentHandle.description: An opaque process-local Working Document handle bound to one Engine endpoint instance.

DocumentGeneration.description: An opaque monotonic generation valid only for its endpoint-bound document handle.

PreviewID.description: An opaque endpoint-local preview identity, type-separated from documents and cursors.

WorkbenchLimits.description: Explicit positive caller bounds; every read and edit carries both item and complete logical response-payload byte ceilings. Logical bytes exclude the outer Engine response envelope, include the canonical JSON UTF-8 bytes of the complete operation result with its operation-defined LogicalResponseByteCount field encoded as the string 0 to avoid self-reference (for example page.returned_bytes or ExecuteQueryResult.returned_bytes), and add every referenced BlobRef attachment's declared size once per occurrence.

max_output_bytes.description: Maximum logical response-payload bytes measured by the WorkbenchLimits rule, including referenced attachment bytes.

LogicalResponseByteCount.description: Exact logical response-payload bytes returned: canonical result JSON UTF-8 bytes with this field encoded as the string 0, excluding the outer Engine response envelope, plus each BlobRef attachment's declared size once per occurrence. This count uses the same rule as max_output_bytes.

WorkbenchFailureCategory.description: A stable execution-platform failure reason. Predictable handle, cursor, generation, input, not-found, preview, unsupported, and precondition conditions are rejected with lifecycle-safe diagnostics and never represented as WorkbenchFailure.

WorkbenchFailure.description: A safe transport or execution-platform failure with a closed Workbench reason. category retains the common protocol failure semantics; workbench_category is the stable operation-layer reason.

DocumentCapabilityState.description: Exact availability of every operation for this document generation. These values refine, and never broaden, endpoint handshake capabilities.

WorkingDocumentState.description: The authoritative mode, root identity, and semantic hash summary for one Working Document generation. Pack documents intentionally have no project graph hash.

ReplaceSourceTreeInput.description: Atomically replaces the complete source tree. The replacement may change project/pack mode and root identity; the result is the sole authoritative refreshed document state.

SymbolReadItem.description: One address-ordered symbol match. If several searched fields match, matched_field deterministically selects address before id before display_name; matched_value is that field's original, unnormalized spelling.

FindSymbolsInput.description: Deterministic symbol-index lookup over each subject's canonical StableAddress string, terminal local id, and display_name. exact, prefix, and substring compare Unicode-scalar sequences without normalization; unicode_simple_fold applies Unicode default simple case folding to query and candidate before that comparison. owner_addresses and subject_kinds are optional non-empty filters; absence means unrestricted.

SubgraphGraphFacts.description: Closed graph facts paired with one inspected subject. Entity and Relation branches expose type, placement/endpoints, and bounded row identities without inference.

SubgraphReadItem.description: One item in deterministic online graph traversal order. traversal_index is the zero-based ordinal produced by sorted roots followed by FIFO BFS, canonical incoming-before-outgoing direction order, and each adjacency relation list in canonical order. Root entities are emitted first; each relation and then each newly discovered entity are emitted at first encounter.

BoundedTextChunk.description: One bounded byte chunk of a larger UTF-8 logical value. blob.size is the chunk length; offset and total_bytes locate it within the value; full_digest identifies the complete value across pages.

induced_relation_addresses.description: Canonical relation-candidate tuple order defined by LDL Language 1 Query semantics.

path_relation_addresses.description: Canonical relation-candidate tuple order defined by LDL Language 1 Query semantics.

selected_relation_addresses.description: Canonical relation-candidate tuple order defined by LDL Language 1 Query semantics.

MaterializeViewResult.description: One deterministic semantic ViewData result. returned_items counts every array item recursively within view_data; returned_bytes follows LogicalResponseByteCount with this field encoded as the string 0.

PlanExportInput.description: The complete closed semantic input for deterministic ExportPlan generation. The host resolves and verifies profile requirements before invocation; the Engine validates their recipe binding and executes no renderer, registry, or serializer behavior.

NeighborReadItem.description: One edge in deterministic online graph traversal order. traversal_index is the zero-based ordinal produced by sorted roots, FIFO BFS, canonical incoming-before-outgoing direction order, and each adjacency relation list in canonical order.

SemanticOperationValue.description: A closed recursive authored value; arbitrary untagged JSON is never accepted.

string.description: Inline authored text, capped at 4096 Unicode scalars (therefore at most 16384 UTF-8 bytes); use kind=blob for larger text.

CreateSubjectFields.description: Closed union of the generated Language 1 subject-specific authored field objects.

SourcePatchBatch.description: A deterministic module-path/start-byte ordered batch. Ranges within one module must not overlap; the Engine rejects overlap before editing.

ResultingHashes.description: The deterministic semantic hashes after a preview or apply. Project results include project_address and graph_hash; Pack results include pack_address and intentionally omit graph_hash.

ClassifyAuthoringImpactInput.description: Two complete source trees. The Engine derives the semantic/source diffs and never trusts a caller-labeled diff as validation authority.

CompileResult.description: The complete transport projection of one successful deterministic compiler generation.

ResourceLimits.description: Optional non-negative signed-64-bit compiler limit overrides; absence selects the Engine default.

EffectiveResourceLimits.description: The complete positive signed-64-bit resource limits actually applied to a successful compile.
